envelope.reason: The architectural envelope, including all walls, window opening, door opening, ceiling geometry, and bulkhead structure, remains identical between the baseline and staged images. envelope.reason: The baseline image shows a recessed area with built-in shelves to the right of the sliding wooden door. In the staged image, this recess has been filled in, creating a continuous flat wall surface. This constitutes an alteration to the architectural envelope, specifically a violation of the 'Wall Plane Extension Rule' and 'Local Wall-Plane Continuity Check' as a baseline indentation/recess became a continuous flat wall surface.
